info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Schedule Appointments API
info.description: The Appointment Booking API enables users to schedule appointments efficiently within the system. This API allows applications to create and manage appointments, ensuring that resources are allocated optimally. Typical consumers include service platforms, booking systems, and workflow management tools that require seamless integration of scheduling capabilities. Utilizing this API enhances user experience by allowing automated appointment handling and management.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment by providing the necessary details. Ensure all required fields are populated for successful creation.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new appointment. Please provide all required fields in the JSON format as defined in the schema. Ensure that the data complies with the expected types and formats to avoid validation errors.

400.description: The request has invalid parameters or format.

200.description: The appointment has been successfully created.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Error Response for Appointment Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that triggered the error.

trace.description: A trace or ID for tracking the error in the system.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of an error response for appointment-related operations when a 400 Bad Request response is returned.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.title: Error Details

service.description: Name of the service that generated the error.

errorCode.description: A code representing the specific error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Contains details about an error that may have occurred during the operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Create Appointment Request

patientId.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

doctorId.description: The unique identifier of the doctor.

appointmentDate.description: The date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

appointmentTime.description: The time of the appointment in HH:mm format.

department.description: The department where the appointment will take place.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema for creating a new appointment for a patient with a doctor.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Operation Response

timestamp.description: The time at which the response was generated.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the operation status.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that triggered this response.

trace.description: A trace identifier for debugging purposes.

details.description: Details about any errors that may have occurred during the operation.

suggestion.description: Recommendations for the user based on the operation result.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for successful appointment operations.
